scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix apps/backend && npm install --prefix apps/frontend
scripts.db:init: npm run db:create:test && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.test:e2e: npm run db:init:test && npm --prefix apps/backend run test:e2e
scripts.db:init:test: npm --prefix apps/backend run prisma:test:create && npm --prefix apps/backend run prisma:migrate:test && npm --prefix apps/backend run prisma:seed
scripts.start: echo "No application start configured yet. Run npm run db:up to start PostgreSQL."
